mapper.update: UPDATE ord_order SET trade_status = 30, pay_status = 10, fulfill_status = 10, cancel_reason = '系统超时关闭未支付订单', update_time = NOW() WHERE trade_status = 10 AND pay_status = 10 AND expire_time <= NOW() AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE wms_inventory_lock lock_record INNER JOIN ord_order timeout_order ON timeout_order.order_no = lock_record.biz_no SET lock_record.release_qty = lock_record.lock_qty, lock_record.lock_status = 20, lock_record.update_time = NOW() WHERE lock_record.biz_type = 1 AND lock_record.lock_status = 10 AND timeout_order.trade_status = 30 AND timeout_order.pay_status = 10 AND lock_record.is_deleted = 0 AND timeout_order.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msg_record (id, msg_no, template_code, receiver_type, receiver_id, channel_type, title, content, biz_type, biz_no, read_status, send_status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626000000000 + o.id, CONCAT('MSG_PAY_REMIND_', o.order_no), 'TPL_ORDER_PAY_REMIND', 1, o.user_id, 2, '订单支付提醒', CONCAT('您的订单 ', o.order_no, ' 即将超时关闭，请尽快完成支付'), 'order', o.order_no, 0, 10, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM ord_order o WHERE o.trade_status = 10 AND o.pay_status = 10 AND o.expire_time > NOW() AND o.expire_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM msg_record msg WHERE msg.msg_no = CONCAT('MSG_PAY_REMIND_', o.order_no) AND msg.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO pur_purchase_order (id, purchase_no, source_type, period_id, supplier_id, warehouse_id, region_id, city_id, delivery_date, purchase_status, audit_status, create_account_id, create_reason, expected_arrival_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626100000000 + p.id * 1000 + sku.supplier_id, CONCAT('PUR_SYS_', p.period_no, '_', sku.supplier_id), 1, p.id, sku.supplier_id, p.warehouse_id, p.region_id, p.city_id, p.delivery_date, 10, 20, NULL, '系统截团自动生成采购单', TIMESTAMP(p.delivery_date, '08:00:00'), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM sale_publish_period p INNER JOIN sale_publish_sku sku ON sku.period_id = p.id WHERE p.stock_mode = 2 AND p.status = 20 AND p.actual_cutoff_time <= NOW() AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND sku.status = 1 AND sku.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pur_purchase_order po WHERE po.purchase_no = CONCAT('PUR_SYS_', p.period_no, '_', sku.supplier_id) AND po.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id, p.period_no, sku.supplier_id, p.warehouse_id, p.region_id, p.city_id, p.delivery_date

INSERT INTO pur_purchase_item (id, purchase_id, purchase_no, product_id, sku_id, supplier_id, warehouse_id, apply_qty, purchase_qty, received_qty, rejected_qty, purchase_price, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626110000000 + sku.id, po.id, po.purchase_no, sku.product_id, sku.sku_id, sku.supplier_id, p.warehouse_id, GREATEST(sku.sold_qty + sku.locked_qty, 0), GREATEST(sku.sold_qty + sku.locked_qty, 0), 0, 0, COALESCE(sku.purchase_price, 0.0000), 1, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM sale_publish_period p INNER JOIN sale_publish_sku sku ON sku.period_id = p.id INNER JOIN pur_purchase_order po ON po.purchase_no = CONCAT('PUR_SYS_', p.period_no, '_', sku.supplier_id) WHERE p.stock_mode = 2 AND p.status = 20 AND p.actual_cutoff_time <= NOW() AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND sku.status = 1 AND sku.is_deleted = 0 AND po.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pur_purchase_item item WHERE item.purchase_no = po.purchase_no AND item.sku_id = sku.sku_id AND item.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO wms_wave_batch (id, wave_no, period_id, warehouse_id, line_id, delivery_date, required_qty, locked_qty, status, create_account_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626120000000 + p.id, CONCAT('WAVE_SYS_', p.period_no, '_', p.warehouse_id), p.id, p.warehouse_id, line.line_id, p.delivery_date, COALESCE(SUM(item.qty), 0), 0, 10, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM sale_publish_period p INNER JOIN ord_order_item item ON item.period_id = p.id INNER JOIN ord_order o ON o.id = item.order_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, MIN(id) AS line_id FROM wms_line WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY warehouse_id ) line ON line.warehouse_id = p.warehouse_id WHERE p.stock_mode = 1 AND p.status = 20 AND p.actual_cutoff_time <= NOW() AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND item.is_deleted = 0 AND o.pay_status = 30 AND o.trade_status IN (20, 30, 50) AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM wms_wave_batch wave WHERE wave.wave_no = CONCAT('WAVE_SYS_', p.period_no, '_', p.warehouse_id) AND wave.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id, p.period_no, p.warehouse_id, line.line_id, p.delivery_date

INSERT INTO wms_pick_task (id, pick_no, wave_id, warehouse_id, line_id, assign_account_id, required_qty, actual_qty, shortage_qty, status, complete_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626130000000 + wave.id, CONCAT('PICK_SYS_', wave.wave_no), wave.id, wave.warehouse_id, wave.line_id, NULL, wave.required_qty, 0, 0, 10, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM wms_wave_batch wave WHERE wave.status = 10 AND wave.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM wms_pick_task pick_task WHERE pick_task.pick_no = CONCAT('PICK_SYS_', wave.wave_no) AND pick_task.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO wms_loading_order (id, loading_no, wave_id, warehouse_id, line_id, driver_account_id, delivery_date, required_qty, actual_qty, status, load_account_id, load_time, outbound_account_id, outbound_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626140000000 + wave.id, CONCAT('LOAD_SYS_', wave.wave_no), wave.id, wave.warehouse_id, wave.line_id, NULL, wave.delivery_date, wave.required_qty, 0, 10, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM wms_wave_batch wave WHERE wave.status = 10 AND wave.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM wms_loading_order loading_order WHERE loading_order.loading_no = CONCAT('LOAD_SYS_', wave.wave_no) AND loading_order.is_deleted = 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sale_publish_period SET status = 40, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 20 AND actual_cutoff_time <= NOW() AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE msg_record SET send_status = 10, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE send_status = 30 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE pay_refund_trade SET refund_status = 10, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE refund_status = 40 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE fin_split_flow SET split_status = 10, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE split_status = 40 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fin_reconciliation_batch (id, reconcile_no, channel_type, reconcile_date, total_count, success_count, diff_count, total_amount, diff_amount, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626150000000 + channel.channel_type, CONCAT('REC_', DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d'), '_', channel.channel_type), channel.channel_type, CURDATE(), 0, 0, 0, 0.0000, 0.0000, 10, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM ( SELECT 1 AS channel_type UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ) channel WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fin_reconciliation_batch batch WHERE batch.reconcile_no = CONCAT('REC_', DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d'), '_', channel.channel_type) AND batch.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO rpt_snapshot (id, snapshot_no, report_type, stat_date, city_id, supplier_id, station_id, warehouse_id, metric_json, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626160000000 + city_scope.city_id, CONCAT('RPT_CITY_', DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d'), '_', city_scope.city_id), 1, CURDATE(), city_scope.city_id, NULL, NULL, NULL, JSON_OBJECT('order_count', city_scope.order_count, 'pay_amount', city_scope.pay_amount), 1, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM ( SELECT o.city_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0.0000) AS pay_amount FROM ord_order o WHERE DATE(o.create_time) = CURDATE() AND o.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY o.city_id ) city_scope WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rpt_snapshot snapshot WHERE snapshot.snapshot_no = CONCAT('RPT_CITY_', DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d'), '_', city_scope.city_id) AND snapshot.is_deleted = 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE op_todo SET status = 60, update_time = NOW() WHERE status IN (10, 20) AND due_time IS NOT NULL AND due_time <= NOW() AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO op_todo (id, todo_no, todo_type, source_biz_type, source_biz_no, title, priority, process_role_code, process_account_id, city_id, supplier_id, warehouse_id, status, due_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626170000000 + q.id, CONCAT('TODO_QUAL_EXPIRE_', q.qualification_no), 80, 'supplier_qualification', q.qualification_no, '供应商资质即将到期', 2, 'supplier_manager', NULL, NULL, q.supplier_id, NULL, 10, TIMESTAMP(q.valid_end_date, '23:59:59'), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM sup_qualification q WHERE q.audit_status = 20 AND q.valid_end_date IS NOT NULL AND q.valid_end_date >= CURDATE() AND q.valid_end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND q.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM op_todo todo WHERE todo.todo_no = CONCAT('TODO_QUAL_EXPIRE_', q.qualification_no) AND todo.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO op_todo (id, todo_no, todo_type, source_biz_type, source_biz_no, title, priority, process_role_code, process_account_id, city_id, supplier_id, warehouse_id, status, due_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626180000000 + c.id, CONCAT('TODO_CONTRACT_EXPIRE_', c.contract_no), 81, 'supplier_contract', c.contract_no, '供应商合同即将到期', 2, 'supplier_manager', NULL, NULL, c.supplier_id, NULL, 10, TIMESTAMP(c.valid_end_date, '23:59:59'), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM sup_contract c WHERE c.status = 20 AND c.valid_end_date >= CURDATE() AND c.valid_end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM op_todo todo WHERE todo.todo_no = CONCAT('TODO_CONTRACT_EXPIRE_', c.contract_no) AND todo.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO op_exception_record (id, exception_no, exception_type, priority, source_module, source_biz_type, source_biz_no, city_id, supplier_id, station_id, warehouse_id, owner_account_id, status, title, description, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626190000000 + low_inventory.min_inventory_id, CONCAT('EX_LOW_INV_', low_inventory.warehouse_id, '_', low_inventory.sku_id), 30, 2, 'wms', 'low_inventory', CONCAT(low_inventory.warehouse_id, '_', low_inventory.sku_id), NULL, low_inventory.supplier_id, NULL, low_inventory.warehouse_id, NULL, 10, 'SKU库存低于补货阈值', CONCAT('SKU ', low_inventory.sku_id, ' 当前可用库存 ', low_inventory.available_qty, '，低于阈值 10'), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM ( SELECT inv.warehouse_id, inv.sku_id, inv.supplier_id, MIN(inv.id) AS min_inventory_id, SUM(inv.available_qty) AS available_qty FROM wms_inventory inv WHERE inv.inventory_status = 20 AND inv.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY inv.warehouse_id, inv.sku_id, inv.supplier_id HAVING SUM(inv.available_qty) < 10 ) low_inventory WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM op_exception_record ex WHERE ex.exception_no = CONCAT('EX_LOW_INV_', low_inventory.warehouse_id, '_', low_inventory.sku_id) AND ex.status IN (10, 20) AND ex.is_deleted = 0 )

INSERT INTO search_suggest_word (id, word, source_type, product_id, city_id, hit_count, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) SELECT 260626200000000 + p.id, p.product_name, 1, p.id, p.city_id, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM prd_product p WHERE p.sale_status = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.city_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM search_suggest_word word WHERE word.product_id = p.id AND word.source_type = 1 AND word.is_deleted = 0 )
